entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

I'm currently a single mom from Vietnam, working in financial field, but luckily that I've had a chance to know SAP as a user. Thanks SAP a lot for giving these free SAP certificate to us - woman in mid-life. Actually, the fee for getting SAP certificate, is not too much for some others, but for a single mom and in VN, it's quite a challenge for me.
I'm looking for a chance to move to SAP field, for joining better company here, as a SAP consultant. It's a better job in VN currently. So, I'd like to take this chance as an 1st step for moving further in my new career path. It will be grateful if I will be granted this chance.

Thanks so much David

entry.title: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adaptation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have one requirement to add a tab in "Manage cost center"  app, and under that tab to add few fields.

While am trying to add a tab using UI Adaptation, am getting below error.

If anyone has faced similar challenges, let me know. And Please help if you have implemented these changes in your project.

Thanks.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition

entry.title: Message Definition like Service interface in Sproxy in SAP ERP when using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Dear Experts

We currently have SAP PI system and we have integrated it with SAP ERP and CRM.

We use lot of ABAP proxies to connect SAP systems with SAP PI.

Now we are replacing SAP PI with cloud-based Integration Suite.

Need help in couple of questions:

1. New interface: There is XI adapter in Integration Suite but how does one create message definition like Service Interface, Message type, etc definition in SAP systems like ERP and CRM as there is no ESR in Intergration Suite?

2. Existing interfaces: how does one use existing ABAP proxy interfaces or transform them as we will not have ESR and SLD of SAP PI after switch to IS.

Thanks in advance.

Sunit

entry.title: Re: HANA database Restore on MS SQL Server
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: I want to make only certain rows editable in table co...
entry.content: Paste your whole PBO and the whole code of the module with "loop at screen".

entry.title: Re: Moving from Solman to C-ALM, what about users with no...
entry.content: There are no plans to integrate the SAP EarlyWatch Alert Report generation into SAP Focused Run. After end of maintenance of SAP Solution Manager, the consumption of the SAP EarlyWatch Alert results is driven by SAP for Me only. The EWA apps in SAP for Me can send out email notifications on critical findings to inform users. If you have a central team with access to SAP for Me, this team can download the EWA reports on demand and share them with users who have no external access in your company.

entry.title: Re: How can I discover what instance is the Primary Appli...
entry.content: A SAP system running with HANA database is a special case, SWPM must run on the server, where an application server is running, to start the export. For all other databases the export must be started on database host. The system copy guide tells only, it should be this server:

entry.title: Re: How can I discover what instance is the Primary Appli...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SLTOOLSET/ae1552407b9846a1997cc04b9fce521e/cd1de2ef6fcd4a3e9bd6998d2cd529fe.html?version=CURRENT_VERSION&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: HANA database Restore on MS SQL Server
entry.content:
Hi,

The migration of a SAP HANA database system to a 'SAP NetWeaver release 7.0x/7.xy on Microsoft SQL Server (Enterprise Edition)'  is supported through the SAP System Copy process.
The Installation and System Copy guides for SAP NetWeaver 7.0x/7.xy release can be downloaded from 'Software Provisioning Manager':
https://support.sap.com/en/tools/software-logistics-tools.html

Regards,
Riccardo

entry.title: Re: How can I discover what instance is the Primary Appli...
Re: Access SAP Cloud ALM analytics from SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
{
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "CALMExtensionAPI",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.read",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.providers.read",
        ]
    }
}

Please correct the invalid JSON. There must be no comma after "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.analytics.providers.read", <--- Otherwise you get "JSON input contains errors." Also please note that the content of "xsappname": must match the name of the service-instance to make it work.

entry.title: Re: Global filter definition for Country Compliance WTPA forms
entry.content:
@KristenCannard  Thanks for your time in reviewing this topic.

Details of form name can be found in offical legal website 'New York Notice of Pay' page - https://dol.ny.gov/notice-pay-rate 

(which can also found in next Blog article "WTPA Form Fields Configuration" )

Regarding expected values for the Employment Type, above mentioned example is just for reference, in real case you can link WTPA form name to any derived field or direct field.

Anyways 'employmentType' used in above example is from JobInfo entity which is a picklist field and can have entries purely based on Organisation structure.

California WTPA forms are planned for 2411 release, you can refer the delivery timelines for same. Post release cycle documentation of same would be updated.

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required for Integrating local Application...
entry.content:
My  application is .Net MVC framework , not core 
it's running locally on windows

entry.title: Re: HANA database Restore on MS SQL Server
entry.content:
Hi,

The migration of a SAP HANA database system to a SAP NetWeaver/Microsoft SQL Server 'Enterprise Edition' system is supported through the SAP System Copy process (Heterogeneous OS/DB system copy).

The Installation and System Copy guides for "SAP NetWeaver release 7.0x/7.xy on Microsoft SQL Server" can be downloaded from 'Software Provisioning Manager' website:

https://support.sap.com/en/tools/software-logistics-tools.html 

Regards,
Riccardo

entry.title: Outbound ATP webservice interface
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need to implement on SAP ECC an outbound interface from SAP to an external storage with webservice method.

In detail I need, when I create a sales order, an ATP check on the material but the ATP check must be done on the external storage by a webservice interface (HTTP procotol and JSON file format).

Can anyone help me to understand how I can achieve and configure this?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: The print button I created in the toolbar is not work...
entry.content: CL_GUI_CONTAINER=>SCREEN0 is a container in front of the normal Dynpro, so classic Dynpro content is hidden. Two solutions to show the content: free CL_GUI_CONTAINER=>SCREEN0 (will also free what's inside e.g. ALV) or make its content invisible (SET_VISIBLE false). As I said, CL_GUI_CONTAINER=>SCREEN0 is not official, it's something to be used only for quick or short demonstrations.

entry.title: Re: Execute BEx queries at the same time
entry.content: Ztest is executing very fast and I cannot repeat the situation vice versa. At the moment when queries are running, in sm50 I see only one working process:

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: @saurabh_shukla4 A simple way to discuss efficiently is to create a small test program to reproduce the issue and post it (of course, sharing via a Git repository is the best way when it concerns non-ABAP objects like Dynpro, these objects can be uploaded/downloaded in an instant via abapGit).

entry.title: Re: Setting up my Mac for SAP Development
entry.content: I couldn't find out whether ADT now support ARM based architecture. But I assume it does by now?

entry.title: How to delete content from table WWWDATA
entry.content:
WWWDATA table has different content in different systems

To keep data consistent in all systems, please guidwe how to delete content from table WWWDATA?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete content from table WWWDATA
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

the contents of database table WWWDATA are managed with transaction SMW0. This transaction can upload/download content to/from the system and also delete entries. On the initial screen you can choose between HTML templates or binary data. On the second screen you can filter for specific entries - if you just press 'Execute' you will be presented with a list of all entries. On this list you can mark the entries you want to delete and press delete. I hope this is helpful.

Best regards,

SAP Development Support

entry.title: Re: How to allow an empty string with check condition in xml transformation?
entry.content: Look at the documentation. s-check, d-check, check.

entry.title: Re: S4 Pub Cloud - Commodity Codes in Sales docs and outputs
entry.content:
Hi,

You'll need to output form customization for your requirement. With S/4HANA Cloud, SAP provides a set of sample output form template. End users are encouraged to design their own output form templates for different transactional documents with Adobe LiveCycle Designer (Windows Ver.) which can be downloaded for free in S/4HANA Cloud.

Please check Output Management (1LQ) for a general overview. Detailed guidance refer to Setting Up Output Management.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: An Implementation of Text-to-SQL with AI
entry.content:
Great blog @SeaZhang 

From the given code, apparently you are using MINILM for the embeddings, right? so, no vector DB is used in this example, it maps sentences vector space directly, for the intent.

It will be interesting using the HANA Cloud embeddings, I would love to familiarize myself with that more often

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: @KatherineKenneally  Thank you. works fine now. able to post

entry.title: Re: How can I discover what instance is the Primary Application Server?
entry.content:
Hi Bruno,
By checking the profiles, you should be able to identify which is the Primary Application Server or ASCS (depending on system configuration).
Central instance will be called SID_DVEBMGS$$_hostname (where $$ stands for instance number).
In case of an ASCS, where ENQ and MS run outside, it will be called SID_ASCS$$_hostname.
The rest of the application servers are named as SID_D$$_hostname.
Regardsm
Raquel

entry.title: Re: Hiding Translation and Packages for specific users in...
entry.content: Hi thanks

entry.title: Re: liberation strategy connection
entry.content: Sorry I am not in approval strategies and think this is procurement specific. Are with approval strategy workitems created? If yes, you could approve these also in My Inbox. If you do not have experiences in course BIT602 MyInbox is discussed https://training.sap.com/course/bit602-sap-workflow--overview-basics-strategy-and-extensibility-classroom-023-g-en/ On which system you operate?

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content: @appel_solar_dk Hi, downsides or technical limitations vary depending on customer situations and use cases. However, in SAP Datasphere, there is a feature called semantic onboarding, where customers would not lose business semantics of data and efforts spent on previous solutions when migrating. Please refer to SAP Help for more information.

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge

entry.title: Re: Missing Hours calculation on Manage My Timesheet
entry.content: Hi, I am as well not able to see this KBA.

entry.title: Re: An Implementation of Text-to-SQL with AI
entry.content:
No, I didn't.

I think to use LLM to do the intent detection is also working. 

Below code is the one I used to detect the intent:

def intent_detector(question: str, model_name:str = 'llama3'😞
model = Ollama(model=model_name, format="json", temperature=0)
parser = JsonOutputParser()
template_prompt = """You are a request classifier.
If the below request is to do analytics on data per various dimension, then classify the action as "analytics".
If the action cannot be classified as "analytics", then classify the action as "data".
If the request is related to sales orders/SO, business partners/BP and the corresponding products, then classify the category as "sales".
If the request is related to finance, e.g. GL account, profit center, customer from various countries, financial transaction and the corresponding products, then classify the category as "fi".
If the request is related to employee, e.g. head count, performance, department, division and so on, then classify the category as "hr".
Respond in valid json only in the below format and do not include any explanation.


{{
"category":<sales or FI or HR>,
"action": <data or analytics>
}}

Request:
{question}

Output:
"""

prompt = PromptTemplate.from_template(
template=template_prompt,
input_variable=['question'],
partial_variables={"format_instructions": parser.get_format_instructions()},
)

chain = prompt | model | parser

intent = chain.invoke(question)
print(intent)
return intent
 
And I can get a result like:
{"category": "FI", "action": "data"}. 
This can determine what data to pull, and draw a picture with chart if the action is "analytics". 
The new code is used in my trial on LangGraph.

entry.title: Re: Dashboard develop into SAP Business One SQL
entry.content: If you work with the web client, you can create all kinds of dashboards

entry.title: Re: Number Range objects
entry.content:
Hi rameshputta,

please make sure following roles/catalogs are assigned:

  • Business Catalog: SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_NUM_PC (Number Range Management – Configuration)
  • Business Role: BR_BPC_EXPERT

The flow for the transport is as follows:

  • In your (development) software component create a number range object in ADT and release the workbench transport
  • In your development system in the Manage Number Range Intervals app you create an interval on a customizing request in your (business configuration) software component and release the customizing transport
  • You can create and check your customizing request in the "Export Customizing Transports" app
  • Finally in the target system you would clone/pull both the (development) software component with the number range object as well as the (business configuration) software component with the interval

For the number range object part, please refer to: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/maintaining-number-range-objects
For the interval part, please refer to: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-abap-environment/abap-environment/manage-number-range-intervals

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

Hope you are well!

I identify as a person in the below categories:

  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life.
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

I switched my career from customer services industry to SAP SuccessFactors at the age of 31. I'm currently working as a Trainee Consultant and the certification attempt will greatly help me in my career and financial growth. Unfortunately, as per my current financial situation, I'm unable to afford a certification attempt for myself.

I will be extremely grateful to you and SAP, if I'm provided with this certification attempt.

entry.title: S/4HANA TM & EWM Embedded - Configuration Guide
entry.content:
We are implementing S/4 HANA 2023 FPS 01 version where we have SAP Transportation Management and SAP Extended Warehouse Management modules are embedded. Please share configuration URL so that we can start configuration for both modules.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA TM & EWM Embedded - Configuration Guide
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You can find the configuration guide here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DIGITAL_SUPPLY_CHAIN_MANAGEMENT_EDITION_S4HANA or note 2933925 - Setup embedded TM- embedded EWM Integration via soamanager (WSRM)

"Integration of EWM and TM in One Client" << this is for LDAP messages based integration.

For ASR integration, please use note ##3225241 - Advanced Shipping and Receiving - Setup Guide

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content: @MJose Hi, you can use different Spaces for different purposes in Datasphere.

entry.title: SAP CPI Production Order Creation Fails Due to Invalid Time Format in OData Response
entry.content:
Hi team,

I'm working on a SAP CPI iFlow that creates production orders in SAP S4H, using the Production Order (Version 2) API.

I started by testing the connection between CPI and SAP, so I only have a Content Modifier with the payload and a Request Reply to connect to the OData adapter.

The payload is as follows:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<A_ProductionOrder_2>
<A_ProductionOrder_2Type>
<ManufacturingOrderType>ZP01</ManufacturingOrderType>
<Material>SG002</Material>
<ProductionPlant>3516</ProductionPlant>
<MRPController>001</MRPController>
<MfgOrderPlannedStartDate>2024-09-15T00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedStartDate>
<MfgOrderPlannedStartTime>00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedStartTime>
<MfgOrderPlannedEndDate>2024-09-16T00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedEndDate>
<MfgOrderPlannedEndTime>00:00:00</MfgOrderPlannedEndTime>
<ProductionUnit>PC</ProductionUnit>
<TotalQuantity>10</TotalQuantity>
</A_ProductionOrder_2Type>
</A_ProductionOrder_2>

With this payload, I'm successfully creating production orders, so it doesn't seem like the payload is incorrect. However, CPI is always returning the following error:

com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: com.sap.gateway.core.ip.processor.exception.ODataProcessingException: Exception occurred in converting [class java.util.GregorianCalendar] with value [java.util.GregorianCalendar[time=?,areFieldsSet=false,areAllFieldsSet=false,lenient=false,zone=sun.util.calendar.ZoneInfo[id="Etc/UTC",offset=0,dstSavings=0,useDaylight=false,transitions=0,lastRule=null],firstDayOfWeek=1,minimalDaysInFirstWeek=1,ERA=?,YEAR=?,MONTH=?,WEEK_OF_YEAR=?,WEEK_OF_MONTH=?,DAY_OF_MONTH=?,DAY_OF_YEAR=?,DAY_OF_WEEK=?,DAY_OF_WEEK_IN_MONTH=?,AM_PM=?,HOUR=?,HOUR_OF_DAY=24,MINUTE=0,SECOND=0,MILLISECOND=?,ZONE_OFFSET=?,DST_OFFSET=?]] to String., cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: HOUR_OF_DAY

I believe the issue is related to two tags in the Request Reply response: MfgOrderPlannedEndTime and MfgOrderScheduledEndTime, with the value PT24H00M00S. It seems that java.util.GregorianCalendar only accepts hours in the range of 0-23, but according to SAP documentation, the hour 24:00 is allowed (which seems incorrect to me).

I'm struggling to find a solution for this issue, as it seems to be a very basic error.

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: No Authorization to Start the UI for Transacation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We are trying to access some configuration in CBC Example:

Error: No Authorization to Start the UI for Transaction


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No Authorization to Start the UI for Transacation
entry.content:
No access to configuration activities
Assign Catalog for configuration activity for area concerned

 

Configuration activities For accounts payable configuration activities business catalog  SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_AP0_PC - Accounts Payable - Configuration is needed 
Example configuration activities 
Set Up All Company Codes for Payment Transactions   S_ALR_87100688
Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions  S_ALR_87100689
Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions S_ALR_87100690

For Cash Journal - System Specific configuration 
Cash Journal - System Specific Configuration SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_CJ1_PC
Cash Journal - Configuration SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_CJ0_PC is needed 
 
 Example configuration activity 
  Maintain Business Transactions  S_ALR_87100687
  
For Asset Accounting - Configuration SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_FIN_AA0_PC is needed for 
example configuration activity  Define asset Class   

See also https://me.sap.com/processnavigator

SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Accelerators 
-> Implementation -> Configuration apps

entry.title: crystal report footer blank space at end
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have added a report footer into an existing crystal report with terms.  when I print the report its prints 1st page with all header and details and 2nd page just report footer but its giving totally 1/3 in display but when i print its prints only 1 & 2nd page and the third one is just blank no page.  As anyone faced this issue please help me.  following is the screenshot of the report footer and output.

entry.title: What You Must Know About SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

This blog provides an overarching overview on the key facts on what you must know about SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition!

Starting off with:


What is SAP Signavio Process Insights?
SAP Signavio Process Insights is a cloud solution running on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) that delivers data-driven insights into business processes and their usage based on data from one or more source systems. It helps organizations to achieve business process excellence by helping to identify where processes can be improved, allowing users to drill down to understand root causes, and providing recommendations on how to improve. It allows users to navigate through their business process transformation journey from insight to action to maximize process excellence.


What Is SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition?
The discovery edition of SAP Signavio Process Insights gives you a first look at the performance of your business processes as well as recommendations for improvements before you commit to the full solution. It allows you to start exploring a reduced set of process performance data using the SAP Signavio Process Insights application with minimal onboarding.

You extract a limited data set for a selected number of process performance indicators from your ERP system, validate the data, and send it to SAP.

Request your analysis here: https://url.sap/discovery-edition.

We recommend reading the Get-started blog because it provides step-by-step guidance on how to request the discovery edition. After five business days, you receive access to a dedicated discovery edition tenant that has been created for you and into which your data has already been imported. To expand the perspectives on the analysis, you can invite experts from within your organization.


How does the discovery edition differentiate itself from SAP Signavio Process Insights (full edition)?
Take a look at the overview to get an overall understanding of the main differences:

Want to read the full blog? Access it here: The difference between SAP Signavio Process Insigh... - SAP Community


SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is the ideal starting point when you want to:

  • Analyze your Business Processes
  • Transit from your SAP ERP system to SAP S/4HANA
  • Optimize your SAP S/4HANA system

Your value from SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis 

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition offers a one-time free of charge* analysis with unique tailored insights into your current operational business process performance, based on data from your SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system. Hence, the analysis provides ways in which operational efficiency objectives can be achieved - a critical point for staying competitive in today’s dynamic markets - by outlining specific insights and recommendations segmented by line of business and end-to-end processes.

The value analysis outlines the estimated benefits (potential monetary gains) that can be realized through process optimizations and improvements.

More functionalities such as automation, intelligent technologies, SAP Fiori apps, and all the SAP cloud solutions are available with SAP S/4HANA, enabling enhanced operational efficiency and innovation.

To broaden your knowledge, we recommend reading these blogs:

Executive summary
Part I: Introductory blog designed for business decision makers to get a comprehensive understanding of the discovery edition: Receive and present a clear picture of your proces... - SAP Community

Part II: New topics within the Executive summary (AI recommendations, HR recommendations): NEW PDF Executive Summary now delivered by default... - SAP Community


Blog series of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition
Consisting of a total of eleven blogs, the series will comprehensively explain all important aspects of SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition analysis, with the help of visuals: Introducing Blog Series of SAP Signavio Process In... - SAP Community

Start your transformation journey to SAP S/4HANA:
Part I: This blog is relevant for you want to prepare the transformation of your SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA system: Move to SAP S/4HANA with SAP Signavio Process Insi... - SAP Community

Part II: This blog is relevant for you when you have already an existing SAP S/4HANA system and aim for updating it to the latest version: Innovations for live SAP S/4HANA systems with SAP ... - SAP Community

Request your analysis: SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition

Please keep in mind that SAP partners can no longer request SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition on behalf of their customers for legal reasons.

Any questions?
Feel free to reach out by sending an email to: Signavio-Discovery@sap.com or leave a comment in the comment section.

Kind regards, 
SAP Signavio Discovery team

entry.title: Problems with the Message Summary Alerts window
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.150) FP 2102 (64-bit)

A user minimizes the Messages and Alerts window and continues working in Sap.

After a few minutes it returns to the messages and alerts window (maximize).
this one appears with a white screen.

The problem only occurs for one user (30 users on the company)

Any suggestion ?

entry.title: How is the "Missing Hours" is being calculated in "Manage My Timehseet" application ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We would really like to know in "Manage My Timesheet" app how is the Missing Hours which displays in the overview of the App Tile is calculated ? 

Also, is there any way we also can check where is this missing hours flowing from ?

We have done internal analysis on the reporting perspective and see that planned hours and actual hours are matching; but we are not really sure where is this missing hours coming from ?

Any lead on this topic is much appreciated.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Balance carryforward of actual data from SAP to SAC P...
entry.content:
Hi Gavin,

IFIACTPLNJEIC is  the technical view name of CDS view I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube. Not sure how you consume this in SAC where the S/4HANA import connection is based on OData services. Probably you are using OData service API_JOURNALENTRYITEMBASIC_SRV that uses the above CDS view underneath. However, this OData service and the CDS view underneath are not suited for extracting the opening balance. Therefore we have a separate OData service UI_FINS_GLACCOUNTFLOW. See documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/48f4b4785b8e45938ac44a67be8032d9/3020da2c5b1b48d88c3b5c3fb8ad43bc.html

Best regards
Hartmut

entry.title: Visibility work seniority result
entry.content:
In the last release (1H 2024) SAP released new functionality to calculate employee work seniority based on MDF objects (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/3d58995c3ad540d5b18d24f112a7c577.html?parentHref=/whats-new/8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885?Version=1H%202024&q=seniority&locale=en-US&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What's%20New&locale=en-US).

This is great functionality to calculate the seniority; but it seems that there is no UI available to make the results visible to employees/managers on the people profile (no element to add and it does not seem possible to create a custom UI for the MDF object). Are we missing something? In the implementation guide I also don't see anything around visibility of the result (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/c18eb6c8febd4d7c924db8a257ce940d/37d55f65235c4f6690241f45f68055bb.html?q=seniority&locale=en-US).

entry.title: Showing incumbents who moved internally
entry.content:
Hi there,

In my story report I can pull in all active and terminated incumbents of a position. This is not a  problem.  
However, I am struggling to pull in an active incumbent who has moved internally to another position in the following scenario. 

Employee A is employed in the Position 1234 from 1 January 2024 to 30 June 2024. 
Employee A then vacates Position 1234 to move into a new role in Position 5678 on 1 July 2024 and remains employed currently. They were never terminated, just moved from one position to the other. So there is no termination record attached to Employee A. 

When I run a report for Position 1234, it returns that there are no prior incumbents ? Employee A does appear as an active incumbent for Position 5678. 

How do I ensure Employee A is captured as an incumbent for all previously held positions?

My data query structure is as follows: 
Position -> Incumbents (under Employment) -> Personal Information

Any help appreciated. 
Thanks 
Ais

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content: @MKreitlein Hi Martin, SAP Release and Maintenance Strategy specifies different maintenance strategies for each solution.

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content: @MinheeSung Semantic onboarding to me just means empty shell with nothing under. I.e. you will have to rebuild / re-engineer everything in the query layer of SAP BW. Also if you use SAC you will have to rebuild your stories as you can't exchange a datasource from BW with one from another source. All in all I see semantic onboarding as empty as the solution itself. It's like a concept of a plan.

entry.title: Re: Restricting Multiple value using Constraint
entry.content: Thank you very much for your responses.

entry.title: download CSV I get can't load plugin
entry.content:
when I try and download the file using the link below I get an error couldn't load plugin.  Any idea which plugin I need? 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/data-warehouse-cloud-1-begin-trial/jcr:content.github-proxy.1715048737.file/SalesOrders.csv

entry.title: Re: ADT debug - Create breakpoint at FM or Class method
entry.content:
Correct, this is not supported in ADT.

The quickest way to achieve a similar result in ADT would be this:

  • Use Ctrl-Shift-A (on Windows, I'm not sure about the shortcut on Mac) and enter the class name / report name / etc. in order to open the source code in the editor
  • Then use Ctrl-O and enter/select the method name / form name / etc. in order to jump to the relevant code block
  • Then double click on the left side of a code line to create a normal line breakpoint

In general ADT shows other breakpoint types (besides normal line breakpoints) in the breakpoints view: 

Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: Re: Restricting Multiple value using Constraint
entry.content: I will try your method, in our test system

entry.title: Where can I start learning SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework e.g. how it is structured?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Applying the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey explains the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework and how it is applied to accelerate architecture engagements. You will learn and apply the skills and methodology to define a company-specific roadmap while considering the business strategy and priorities.

Learning objectives

After completing this learning journey, you will be able to

  • Explain the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework, how it is structured, and how to tailor it for architecture engagements
  • Create an architecture vision of capabilities and business values considering the SAP Reference Architecture
  • Define a target business architecture enabling to achieve the business goals
  • Build an SAP Solution Architecture based on the business architecture and architecture vision
  • Define a technology architecture and create an architecture roadmap

Prerequisites

  • TOGAF foundation knowledge, preferably TOGAF certified
  • Good understanding of business strategy, organization, functional and process concepts
  • Good understanding of IT strategy, organization, applications, data, and technology concepts

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Unable to Update manually added Standard Fields to St...
entry.content: Hello Sijin,

entry.title: groovyc build failure local setup commece cloud 2211
entry.content:
facing below error while setting up sap commerce cloud 2211 locally windows

[groovyc] org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed:
  [groovyc] General error during conversion: class groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode cannot be cast to class groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode (groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode is in unnamed module of loader groovy.lang.GroovyClassLoader @3a2b459a; groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode is in unnamed module of loader org.apache.tools.ant.AntClassLoader @26c89563)
  [groovyc]
  [groovyc] java.lang.ClassCastException: class groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode cannot be cast to class groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode (groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode is in unnamed module of loader groovy.lang.GroovyClassLoader @3a2b459a; groovy.transform.AnnotationCollectorMode is in unnamed module of loader org.apache.tools.ant.AntClassLoader @26c89563)
  [groovyc]     at org.codehaus.groovy.transform.ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.lambda$findCollectedAnnotations$1(ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.java:187)
  [groovyc]     at java.base/java.util.Optional.map(Optional.java:260)
  [groovyc]     at org.codehaus.groovy.transform.ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.findCollectedAnnotations(ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.java:187)
  [groovyc]     at org.codehaus.groovy.transform.ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.visitAnnotations(ASTTransformationCollectorCodeVisitor.java:93)

tried with playing around with below configurations but did not help

groovyc.fork=false

<extname>.groovyc.fork=false

build.parallel=false

not sure if its log path issue. current hybris installation directory path 

C:\dl\core-customize\hybris\bin\custom

entry.title: Need to restrict the user's authorization to enable external access of BEx Query
entry.content: In SAP BW BEx Query we have option to check if we want to enable external access of the BEx query at query designer level, but in our organization, we have two types of users, developers & another Super user. All the users excluding developers should not be able to enable external access, OLE DB, OData & Easy Query at Query designer level. Can anyone help me with right authorization object & relevant selections to do this.

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Re: Performance Monitoring in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Saimukesh,

You can use the mapping table 'SPACE_SCHEMAS_V_EXT' to map the schema name to a 'SPACE_ID'.
This mapping table can be found in the 'DWC_GLOBAL' schema. 

The 'SCHEMA_NAME' can be found in the table 'M_EXPENSIVE_STATEMENTS'

Regards,

Joran de Vries

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Landscape of the Future
entry.content: Nice one. Thank you. I feel the as well that DSP is the way to go. Even BW has 20+ years of development behind.

entry.title: Re: What is the process of Back ground job in HANA Public cloud and How we can schedule
entry.content: Are you asking for HANA the Database or S/4HANA Public Cloud the ERP system? If it's S/4HANA Public Cloud then please adjust the title.

entry.title: Re: How to use Standard API from BAS
entry.content:
hi @gregorw ,

Yes, I want to use REST or SOAP.

It's possible to use?

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Continuous Improvements Continue with Your Feedback
entry.content:
Since multiple years SAP collects anonymous user feedback in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. To tell the anonymous user directly what we did is impossible, therefore this blog is shedding some light on what feedback we received, the actions taken from there and what we intend to do in the next months.

A short repetition on how we collect end-user feedback in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Since 2020 we allow all users to provide feedback to SAP by clicking the feedback button in the top right area of your SAP screen. Additionally we started to push surveys (in average once a months) to end-users. Either rather generic questions on satisfaction, usability and usefulness via time-controlled surveys to all users or application triggered questions to only users of specific applications. In the later case we can either collect the more generic feedback, e.g. to better understand how an improvement is appreciated, or we can ask very specific questions to better understand the users preferences. Additionally, we also had asked in the time-controlled survey questions on user enablement/help or in regards to automation and intelligence to better understand how our users do experience the applications and to prioritize or bring up new improvement ideas.

As a result, there are multiple, often small ideas, that users share with us and that we appreciate and implement or put on our development plan:

  • In the applications "Transfer Stock - in Plant" (F1061) and "Manage Stock" (F1062) we put the implementation of editable fields on the roadmap, as users explained us a specific situation, where the originally taken defaults forces them into unnecessary work, that can be avoided.
  • The application "Create Billing Documents" (F0798) is planned to be improved in multiple aspects. A standalone button should allow the creation of proforma invoices, give more flexibility to add filtering options and finding a more prominent place for the PDF preview button. The better placement of the PDF preview button is also put on the roadmap for "Manage Billing Documents" (F0797), but additional item specific filtering options are planned.
  • A very tangible example in "Reprocess Bank Statement Items" (F1520) to the specific question "is there any information you miss on the screen that would make the application more supportive for your task?" one user suggested the VAT number. We now plan to add the VAT number to the worklist with 2502. 

Why did I talk about these small examples? Because you should know that we care also about the small suggestions that make your life easier, we take them serious and we work diligently on improving our product!

During the time from September 2023 through March 2024 we asked automation related questions and received more than 300 detailed comments where either users had been happy or where they suggested application specific ideas for improvement. Allowing mass changes or directly using the right default values already well describes how the usage of apps becomes efficient. While there was not that one big and genius idea, there were many solid suggestions where development can get very concrete ideas on how to improve a specific application.

For the next six months we plan to occasionally ask questions on SAP Joule, the AI copilot. Our intention is to collect your feedback on where Joule could help you in your daily work, how intuitive the interaction is and how satisfied you are in general with the answers you receive. We encourage you to provide continuously your feedback to help SAP to continuously improve our product.

Additionally please also feel free to comment here on how you like SAP to ask the people working in our product about their opinion?  Would you see special occasions, ehere we should ask the user? Would you like to provide personal feedback, so we could contact you directly? We appreciate your comments!

Earlier blogs on this topic:

Your feedback helps to improve SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

With highest Appreciation! Your Experience Feedback helps us improve Your Products

An Uber for Engineering?

entry.title: Quality Gate Reporting with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Quality Gates are, as the name suggests, "gates" or checkpoints that are planned and carried out at a specific time. The goal is to check the status and content of a delivery object, based on quality criteria determined in advance.

For reporting, SAP is currently working on an expanded option to make "Quality Gate Reporting" even more efficient and effective. So it will be interesting to see what will follow. We have already been able to place some of our requirements and wishes for SAP.

Source: SAP Lab Preview

Now let's look at the options that are already available and can be used in SAP Cloud ALM.
In SAP Cloud ALM, the Quality Gates are prominently listed on the project overview page with the associated progress status.

Source: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Project

New Quality Gates can be created, edited and evaluated using the "Quality Gates" app.

Source: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Project

All Quality Gates are listed in the list view and you can filter by them.

Source: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Project

There is also the option of displaying the Quality Gates graphically on the timeline in a Gantt Chart.

Source: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Project

In the detailed view of a Quality Gate you will find a "checklist" in which the relevant checkpoints are listed. These checkpoints must be checked and approved at the appropriate time.

Source: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Project

I hope I was able to provide an insight and some suggestions on the topic of Quality Gate Management.

entry.title: Attempting to retrieve data using SQLQueries with more than one parameter returns no data
entry.content:
Working with the service layer and I have created an sql query to expect 2 parameters, as below:



While attempting to run the query via GET request, the response returns no value. However I have some data that should be retrieved.



(I created another query with hard coded values and it returns data as expected- below screenshot)

 

I am not sure what the issue is

entry.title: Re: What is the process of Back ground job in HANA Public...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Here's general information: 

Job Scheduling: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/1161ad331e8f47478ba3537caf0af7f3/f08f4a507df34b228a98c45e25cca9b8.html?locale=en-US

More detailed information is available in Application Jobs:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/37e7a011a524405882af49cce79f0fb4.html?locale=en-US

There's a wide variety of job scheduling apps, for example, Schedule General Ledger Jobs:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/12107457ac955c08e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

Creating an Application Job describes how to create your own application job:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/2388da7c4aaf488ca1954f73fd8d40bc.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Sales Order - Item Line FMS not working in CCC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a Formula Manager System (FMS) in the SO_Item Line, where the data is supposed to be captured from the Item Master Data (UDF). The query works perfectly in another database, but when we tried it in a database that is in CCC, it did not function as expected. Both database is in Hana.

Here’s the query we are using:

 
SELECT "U_Contract" FROM OITM WHERE "ItemCode" = $[RDR1.ItemCode]

Could you please advise on why this might be happening and what adjustments might be needed for it to work in the CCC database?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content:
Hi @Jayesh65 

E_ACTAI - SAP Certified Specialist – Project Manager - SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Management 
Please access our SAP Certified Specialist - Project Manager - SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Management website for details 
This certification verifies that the candidate has the knowledge required in the area of SAP Activate agile project management. It validates SAP Cloud-focused advanced business skills and the ability to apply methodologies and tools. It also verifies that the project manager has skills to manage internal and external stakeholders, has basic knowledge of change management processes and can successfully manage the end-to-end transition of the project from Sales to Realization.
Please note: To prepare for this certification, it is necessary to take Learning Journey Discovering SAP Activate in addition to the Learning Journey(s) displayed under "how to prepare".

C_ ACT - SAP Certified Associate – Project Manager 
Please access our  SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate website for details.
This certification verifies that you possess the skills required in the area of SAP project management. It validate project managers' business skills, communication, stakeholder management, change management, successful project transitions, and understanding of testing and quality management, especially for SAP-related projects, requiring the SAP Activate methodology.
Please note: To prepare for this certification, it is necessary to take Learning Journey Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery in addition to the Learning Journey(s) displayed under "how to prepare".

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Reorganizing of demand with T-code MD74 is not working

For example: Sales BOM Header from Plant A, and sub-items from Plant B & Plant C.
